name: [PDF] The Courier Guy Locker API docs
snippet:
Endpoint: https://api.shiplogic.com/rates. Method: GET. When getting rates for a pickup point shipment, use collection_pickup_point_id or.
collection_address or delivery_address with collection_pickup_point_id or delivery_pickup_point_id exactly as with the rates request. Note that the collection_pickup_point_provider and delivery_pickup_point_provider fields with a value of tcg-locker are still required.

The Quote API returns a quote given a destination, location, and parcel attributes. Documentation. Order API. The Order API submits an order to Shippit.
